name: Morning Check-in
description: Scheduled morning voice call check-in with Obsidian vault transcript logging.

vaultPath.label: Obsidian Vault Path
vaultPath.help: Absolute path to your Obsidian vault git repo.

vaultSubdir.label: Notes Subdirectory
vaultSubdir.help: Subdirectory inside vault for daily notes. Default: 'daily-checkins'.

gitSync.label: Git Sync
gitSync.help: Auto commit+push after writing notes. Default: true.

briefingPrompt.label: Custom Briefing Prompt
briefingPrompt.help: Override the default morning briefing system prompt.
